---
title: "Adjusting Biases in Population or Mobility Estimates"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Timing

25-30 minutes.

## Purpose

Show the practical payoff from measuring and explaining bias.

## Code-Along

- Derive correction factors from measured coverage
- Apply adjustment to counts or OD flows
- Use inverse penetration weighting or the relevant `debiasR` adjustment method
- Compare raw and adjusted estimates
- Discuss what adjustment can and cannot fix

## Teaching Point

Adjustment is useful, but it rests on assumptions. The workshop should make
participants more capable and more cautious.

## Exercise

How much do estimates change, and where?
